levelName: Level 58: For Loops - Squares of 1 to 10
puzzleDescription: Learn how to calculate the square of numbers (i * i) from 1 up to 10 using a loop.
objective: Use a for loop to print the squares of numbers from 1 to 10 (1, 4, 9, 16... 100).
hints: Inside the loop, multiply 'i' by itself: 'System.out.println(i * i);'.
